name: Princess Comet: Kumiko Ohba
overview: Comet, a Virgo girl, is sent to Earth for her star school's graduation test, where she must discover the most beautiful things while living as a housekeeper, using magic, all under the watchful eye of her UFO and Star Mother.

trailers.title: コメットさん オープニング (Cosmic Baton Girl  -OP-)
